title: The Hall of Fame
description: See who the Club's legends are! Compete for the #1 spot by hoarding the biggest Treasure and using your Power to create unforgettable experiences.
paz_hold_ranking: Ranking: The Biggest Treasure (Most Gold Hoarded)
pare_hold_ranking: Ranking: The Most Powerful (Most Silver Hoarded)
paz_hold_champions: The Most Loyal (Have the Most Gold)
pare_hold_champions: The Most Powerful (Have the Most Silver)
intro: Welcome to the Nonna's Club! Here, you don't just eat, you create magic. Compete, grow your Treasure, and become a La Piccola Italia legend.
decentralized_info: A unique, transparent, and secure loyalty program where you control the magic. Part of the La Piccola Italia family since 1997.
already_claimed: Your account is already active! Check your treasure.
popular_products_message: The most voted products this month will have legendary discounts next month! Vote for your favorites and decide the future.
choose_favorite_tip: Go to My Account to Vote
